approvedBy: Steve process correction + Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve reprioritized the builder mission toward branch/main/system-health cleanup, provider-proof routing, and explicit merge readiness before continuing more Foundation cards.
scopeSummary: Route approval-bound security and health rows honestly, repair safe verifier/system-health wiring, build merge-readiness proof and closeout, and make the explicit merge decision only after branch gates pass.
notApproved: Do not rotate, revoke, retire, validate, probe, hash, fingerprint, quote, or store provider credentials.
Do not run live extraction, paid/private access, provider APIs, Drive mutation, Gmail/ClickUp sends, Slack sends, Agent Feedback sends, or external writes.
Do not launch hidden delegated workers or parallel builders.
Do not merge main unless branch gates pass, the worktree is clean, and the merge decision is explicit.
Do not mark approval-bound provider or extraction work done.
